calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: David Davenport.
Petitioner: Shuyu Zhao, present in pro per, and as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Ziang Zhao, with Mandarin Interpreter: Li Hong Tan.
Co-Petitioner/Minor's father Yick Mun Cheung, also present in pro per.
Parties and Interpreter were sworn and examined.

No objections to the proposed change of name of minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Kelvin Ziang Zhao.
Decree signed in open court.

The Court orders Petition for Change of Name of Shuyu Zhao Dismissed pursuant to Petitioner's request.
